task_completion.description: Agent accesses the directory containing the DICOM files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or file manager showing the path /home/ga/DICOM/qa_task and its contents.

task_completion.description: Agent inspects the metadata of the DICOM files to check the Patient IDs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Use of a tool (like dcmdump, strings, Python with pydicom, or a DICOM viewer) displaying the metadata of the files in the directory.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies the specific DICOM file with the mismatched Patient ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screen shows the mismatched Patient ID (which starts with 'ERR_') and its corresponding filename.

task_completion.description: Agent opens or creates the required report file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit) or echo/cat command showing the file path /home/ga/DICOM/exports/mismatch_report.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent records the filename of the anomalous DICOM file in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report contains the exact text 'Filename: <filename>' where <filename> is the identified anomalous file.

task_completion.description: Agent records the mismatched Patient ID in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report contains the exact text 'PatientID: <id>' where <id> is the identified mismatched Patient ID (starting with 'ERR_').

integrity.description: Agent did not access the hidden ground truth file.
Agent genuinely extracted the metadata from the DICOM files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used valid commands or scripts to read the DICOM files, rather than typing out the answer without prior inspection.

integrity.description: Agent saved the report to the correct file path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal command clearly indicates the file is being saved to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/mismatch_report.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The DICOM files are located in /home/ga/DICOM/qa_task. The anomalous file has a mismatched Patient ID starting with 'ERR_'. The final report must be saved exactly at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/mismatch_report.txt. The ground truth containing the correct filename and Patient ID is stored in /var/lib/app/ground_truth/qa_answer.json, which the agent must not access.
